dateRange.description: Date range for issue impact and latest-event metadata. Defaults to the last 7 days.

date_from.description: Start of the date range as an ISO timestamp or relative date such as -7d. Defaults to -7d.

date_to.description: End of the date range as an ISO timestamp or relative date. Defaults to now when omitted.

filterTestAccounts.description: When true, exclude internal/test account data from results. Defaults to true.

includeSparkline.description: Set true to include a compact numeric occurrence sparkline. Defaults to false.
